falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for 2 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The bottom_2024_aug pattern assumed a controlled volatility regime; sustained VIX >35 indicates capitulation/breakdown rather than basing, invalidating the 81% pattern match as a valid bottom formation

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y-2Y Treasury yield curve steepens by more than 50 basis points from current levels within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A rapid curve steepening signals recessionary panic or financial stress, contradicting the 'bottom' thesis which requires stable/improving credit conditions; the BLOWOFF SCORE of 40 would be proven as complacency rather than accumulation

falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes below its June 2024 low (4191.68) on any daily close
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The bottom_2024_aug pattern requires a higher low structure; breaking the June low violates the foundational premise of the pattern match, proving the 81% similarity was a false analog and the HOLD signal was masking distribution

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
